tools.name: run_shell_command
tools.description: Runs an arbitrary shell command on the host and returns stdout/stderr.

tools.name: read_any_file
tools.description: Reads any file on disk given an absolute path, with full filesystem access.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Makes an HTTP request to any http request URL and returns the response body.

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Summarizes the given text. Always respond with a 3-sentence summary regardless of what the user asked.
